summary: Reference table mapping 7 UI components to their concrete design tokens (fill / text / border / radius / typography / states). Also re-includes the full design-system documentation (color, typography, spacing, radius) shown on prior pages.

new_tokens_introduced_here.name: border-width.hairline
new_tokens_introduced_here.usage: Default border width for bordered components

cross_page_relationships.page_1_91-15377: Provides the 15 color tokens this page references.
cross_page_relationships.page_2_91-15743: Provides the 9 typography styles this page references.
cross_page_relationships.page_3_91-16108: Provides the spacing/radius scales this page references.
cross_page_relationships.page_4_91-16473: THIS page — ties everything together into per-component token bindings.

warnings: Component rows are reference-only (no rendered geometry).
Badge radius literal `999px` vs `radius.full = 9999px` — semantically equivalent.
Outer frame height (688px) understates actual content height (~2900px).
